{{Quote|This ship stinks of fish. Or so I would imagine. The Mon Calamari are such a disgusting species.|General Grievous|<ref name="General Grievous 1">[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]]</ref>}}
This [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] vessel was used during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] by [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] allied with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="SW:GG">''[[Star Wars: General Grievous]]''</ref>

==Characteristics==
The vessel appeared to be of a similar length to a [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleship]] and was fitted with weapons-blisters like the later [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruisers]]. There was a large [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] opening located on the vessel's starboard side.<ref name="SW:GG" />

==History==
This vessel was [[Capture of the Mon Calamari ship|attacked]] by two [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Battleship/Legends|battleships]] commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] while carrying a group of [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] and their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] protector, the [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quarmall]]. The ship was boarded and all of its Calamari crew were killed. Quarmall was shot by [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] and left for dead but he managed to survive due to his Abyssin physiology. The Padawans were captured and imprisoned by the general.<ref name="SW:GG" />

==Appearances==
*[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]] {{1st}}
